checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 097 prepares the next governed multi-slice live pilot contract from the Standard Loop `next_contract_seed` and records the contract, scope, standard-loop run, handoff, executor packets, runtime launch plans, docs, final report, and audit packet paths.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The executor handoff defines three slices (`status`, `tests`, `docs`) with non-overlapping exclusive write scopes; executor packets and runtime launch plans validate; launch plans remain plan-only.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The contract blocks live Claude Code launch, live Antigravity launch, runtime execution, dependency installation, workflow changes, secrets, production, billing, auth, database, and deployment scope.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No .env files, secrets, private keys, production configuration, billing configuration, authentication security, authorization security, CI/CD security controls, dependency manifests, database paths, or deployment automation were modified.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Standard Loop orchestration, executor packet validation, runtime launch validation, contract validation, scope validation, report validation, audit validation, ChatGPT/Codex audit validation, security gate, review gate, smoke validation, and diff whitespace checks are recorded as local gates.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 097 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The audit packet marks CI as not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion, GitHub CI as not_collected, pending pull request and merge gates, no deployment, and the plan-only runtime boundary.

findings.evidence: Issue 097 local evidence is ready, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
Future live runtime execution remains out of scope for this contract.
